hero_description: FluentBy.ai helps you bridge the gap to fluency. Turn your favorite content into interactive language lessons with AI-powered chat, summaries, and real-world practice.
screenshot_caption: Ask questions about the video content directly
features_desc_1: Learning Spanish and Japanese? No problem. FluentBy.ai supports any language available on YouTube.
features_desc_2: Don't just watch—interact. Have a conversation with the video characters or the content itself.
features_desc_3: Step into the scene. Practice real-world conversations simulated from the video context.
features_desc_4: Your content, your choice. Select any video from your YouTube playlists to start learning immediately.
faq_subtitle: Everything you need to know about mastering languages with FluentBy.ai.
faq_q1: Is FluentBy.ai suitable for complete beginners?
faq_a1: FluentBy.ai is optimized for intermediate to advanced learners who already have a basic grasp of the language. We focus on bridging the gap to fluency using authentic native content, which can be overwhelming for absolute beginners.
faq_a2: You can learn any language! Since our platform is built on top of YouTube, if you can find a video in that language with captions, you can learn it with FluentBy.ai.
faq_q3: How does the 'Chat with Video' feature work?
faq_a3: Our AI analyzes the video's transcript and context to create an interactive comprehension experience. You can ask specific questions about what happened, request explanations of cultural nuances, or even role-play with characters from the video.
faq_q4: Do I need a paid YouTube account?
faq_a4: No, you don't need a YouTube Premium account. FluentBy.ai works with standard YouTube videos available publicly.
footer_text: FluentBy.ai. Master languages with the videos you love.
signin_description: Sign in with Google to start learning with your playlists.
